productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Check Navy Blue Shorts
description: Composition White, navy blue and red plaid check shorts made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with insert pockets on the sides, insert pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, comfortable waistband with loops and drawstring on the inside, and has a buttoned closure on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium hot iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Plaid checks in white, navy blue and red gives a vacation vibe to these shorts from status quo. The insert pockets on the sides and welt pockets on the back are utilitarian. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team these with tees in solid colours. Model statistics The model wears shorts of length 21" Height: 6'; Waist: 32"
